test.note: Pre-existing known failure: no test files on disk (skeleton target in Package.swift). Documented in AGENTS.md as out of scope. Not related to tokenizer-endpoints feature.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Tokenizer Protocol Limitations' section to architecture.md documenting missing padToken and raw chat_template on the Tokenizer protocol.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update tokenizer access pattern from deprecated `engine.loaded?.perform { $0.tokenizer }` to the modern async property pattern: `let container = await engine.loaded; let tokenizer = await container.tokenizer`. The `perform(_:)` method on ModelContainer is marked `@available(*, deprecated)`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature tokenizer-endpoints worker correctly used the modern pattern (`await engine.loaded` then `await container.tokenizer`) because the deprecated method wouldn't work properly. ModelContainer.swift:121-123 shows perform(_:) is deprecated. ModelContainer.swift:96-100 shows var tokenizer as the preferred access.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed skill procedure correctly (no action needed).
